data.title: Women in HVACR to host regional meeting in Houston in May
data.description: Englewood, Colorado - April 8, 2026 - A two-day event called Step Into Your Power is set to take place, aimed at bringing together industry professionals for networking opportunities and leadership development. Women in HVACR (WHVACR), a nonprofit organization focused on empowering women in the heating, ventilation, air conditioning, and refrigeration industry, will be organizing the event. The event is expected to attract a large number of participants looking to connect with like-minded individuals and enhance their leadership skills in the industry.

data.title: Univar Solutions Selected as North American Distributor for Genu-in Collagen Ingredients
data.description: Partnership enhances supply of cutting-edge collagen technologies for food, beverage, and nutraceutical clients, fostering advancements in the expanding health and wellness industry. The collaboration, headquartered in Downers Grove, Illinois, was announced on April 8, 2026. This partnership involves Univar Solutions LLC, a key player in the field, and aims to cater to the increasing demand in this sector.

data.title: Cardinal Plumbing Heating & Air shares water-saving tips ahead of Earth Day
data.description: Area professionals have shared tips on cost-effective changes that can help decrease water bills and minimize waste in homes. Based in Northern Virginia, Cardinal Plumbing Heating & Air is advocating for the adoption of eco-friendly plumbing improvements. This initiative aims to assist homeowners in reducing their environmental impact, with the potential to save significant amounts on expenses related to water usage. Residents are urged to explore options for upgrading their plumbing systems in order to promote sustainability while also benefiting financially.

data.title: Solgaard Appoints Travel Gear Industry Veteran Rob Cooper As President
data.description: A renowned brand in premium luggage and travel gear design, Solgaard, has named Rob Cooper as its President to drive the next stage of growth. The appointment of Cooper, a former President of TUMI, was revealed on April 8, 2026, in New York. Solgaard focuses on sustainable travel gear and accessories, and aims to leverage Cooper's expertise to propel its expansion. The transition is in effect immediately, signaling a strategic move for Solgaard as it progresses in the market.

data.title: Life Time Debuts First Luxury Athletic Country Club in Idaho, Bringing a 135,000-Square-Foot Wellness Destination to the Boise Area
data.description: The first Life Time athletic country club in Idaho has officially opened its doors in Eagle, introducing a range of resort-style amenities, premier pickleball and tennis facilities, family programming, and signature Life Time training to the Treasure Valley. The new location, Life Time Eagle, is the premiere spot for fitness enthusiasts in the area.

data.title: New Jersey Resources Schedules Fiscal 2026 Second Quarter Earnings Call
data.description: Wall, New Jersey-based company, New Jersey Resources (NYSE: NJR), will be broadcasting its fiscal 2026 second quarter financial results live on Tuesday, May 5, 2026, at 10 a.m. Eastern Time. The company intends to announce these results on Monday, May 4, 2026, after the market closes. Interested parties including investors, customers, and members of the financial community can access the webcast by visiting www.njresources.com and selecting "Investor Relations" a few minutes before the scheduled time.

data.title: Oscar Mayer Unveils First Bacon Innovation in Five Years with New Maple Bourbon Bacon
data.description: Today, Oscar Mayer unveiled its newest bacon creation, Oscar Mayer Maple Bourbon Bacon, marking the brand's first bacon innovation in five years. This new offering is cured with Evan Williams Bourbon and features thick-cut, expertly trimmed bacon. The bacon is finished with Oscar Mayer's signature 12-hour slow smoke process and offers subtle hints of vanilla and caramel from the barrel-aged Kentucky bourbon. This launch brings together two iconic brands known for their meat products.

data.title: LionsBot and WISAG Demonstrate Practitioner-Driven Robotics Innovation with R5 Ahead of Interclean 2026
data.description: On April 8, 2026, LionsBot International, a robotics firm from Singapore focusing on automated cleaning solutions, revealed a partnership with WISAG Facility Service, a top German service provider. The collaboration, based in London and Frankfurt, aims to combine expertise in professional cleaning automation. This agreement marks a significant milestone for both companies, showcasing their commitment to innovation in the industry.

data.title: Delta projects solid profits despite rise in fuel prices.
data.description: In recent statistics, the unemployment rate in the country has reached 7%, with over 10 million people currently out of work. Additionally, the stock market experienced a significant drop, with the main index falling by 5% in just one day. Experts predict a slow economic recovery in the upcoming months due to these challenging conditions. On a positive note, the government announced a new stimulus package of $50 billion to support small businesses and individuals affected by the crisis. This financial aid aims to alleviate some of the financial burdens faced by the population and stimulate economic growth.

data.title: Reliance, Inc. to Announce First Quarter 2026 Results on Wednesday, April 22nd
data.description: In Phoenix on April 8, 2026, Reliance, Inc. (NYSE: RS) revealed plans to release its first quarter 2026 financial results on April 22, 2026, following the close of the market. The results will cover the period up to March 31, 2026. A conference call is set to be led by Reliance management on April 23, 2026, at 11:00 a.m. Eastern Time. This call will be live-streamed on the Investors section of the company's website at reliance.com.

data.title: Endeavour Silver Produces 1,875,375 Oz Silver and 11,740 Oz Gold, for a total of 3.3 Million Silver Equivalent Oz in Q1 2026
data.description: In Vancouver, British Columbia, on April 08, 2026, Endeavour Silver Corp. (NYSE: EXK; TSX: EDR) announces its first quarter 2026 production figures: 1,875,375 ounces of silver, 11,740 ounces of gold, and a combined silver equivalent (AgEq) production of 3.3 million ounces. The production numbers are reported in US dollars.

data.title: BD Delivers Next‑Generation TIPS Innovation to Advance Portal Hypertension Care Across the European Union
data.description: Franklin Lakes, N.J. – On April 8, 2026, BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company) announced that the Liverty™ TIPS Stent Graft is poised to broaden treatment possibilities for patients with advanced liver disease. The product has received the CE Marking and is supported by clinical trial data from ARCH. BD, a prominent medical technology company listed on the NYSE under BDX, is at the forefront of this advancement.

data.title: Kontoor Brands Announces Expanded Global Leadership Role for Joseph Alkire
data.description: In Greensboro, North Carolina, Kontoor Brands, Inc. (NYSE: KTB) revealed that Joseph Alkire is set to take on a larger role within the company's Executive Leadership Team. Effective immediately, besides serving as the Chief Financial Officer and Global Head of Operations, Alkire will now also oversee global operations for the Helly Hansen brand. Leading up to this expansion, Alkire has been a key strategic figure since the initial acquisition phase, utilizing his and the team's extensive background in the outdoor sector.
